Yesterday after 10 different avatars i tried to upload to VRChat. Only one successfully uploaded. All the others failed
i feel that so much, and my job is very much not active
past few years, i've been working in vr hardware dev stuff, so troubleshooting was pretty much half the job
so now whenever i have to troubleshoot, im just like "im tryna chill, not work", but stuff still doesn't work until i bash my head in the wall with a headset on
i've got so much copium for the steam frame, it's such an easy foreheaddable headset
colour passthrough and lower face tracking
yeah the PCIe port on the front, i'm planning on doing lower face tracking for it through that
quest pro has miniLED but with so little dimming zones, it might as well just be LCD
babble's already said they're doing something for the frame
i could just pester some of my friends to send me one, i know people at babble

only problem is that pico 4's tracking reporting to steamvr is really bad, which messes with fluxpose tracking
